ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., decision tree, random forest) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used to train the model */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features used to train the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Text description of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training dataset used for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the model */,
  "auc" REAL /* AUC of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "train_test_split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio used to split the data for training and testing */,
  "cross_validation_folds" INTEGER /* Number of folds used in cross-validation */,
  "evaluation_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation dataset used for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_evaluation_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the model was updated */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the updated model */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features used in the updated model */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Text description of the update */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training dataset used for the model after the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_updates_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_updates_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_updates_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model using the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "feature_importance" REAL /* Numerical value representing the importance of the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the feature (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_features_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user uploading the model */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the model was uploaded */,
  "upload_description" TEXT /* Text description of the upload */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training dataset used for the model during the upload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_uploads_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_uploads_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., suggestion, question, praise) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the model (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  "rating_description" TEXT /* Text description of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ratings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being exported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the model */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the model was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported model (e.g., PMML, JSON) */,
  "export_description" TEXT /* Text description of the export */,
  "exported_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the exported model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_exports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_exports_exported_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("exported_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., training, test, evaluation) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the dataset file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, Parquet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
